en.name: Monterey County Now: Wildlife photographers Frans Lanting and Christine Eckstrom paddle 10 miles from San Ardo to San Lucas, documenting bald eagles and beavers along the Salinas River

en.name: BRT Insights: Detailed kayaking and whitewater guide for the Salinas River with sections from Santa Margarita to Atascadero (Class I/II), Camp Roberts to Bradley (Class I), and Bradley to San Ardo (Class I+)
